title: Count tile (Cue) over an AOT query with a display menu item
instruction: In the sandbox model, build a workspace count tile end to end. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="tiles-kpis"). Create: (1) an AOT query DemoBlockedCustomersQuery with CustTable as its single data source (DynamicFields=Yes) and a range on the Blocked field set to CustVendorBlocked::All, so the tile shows an actionable, narrow count; (2) a display menu item DemoBlockedCustomersMI (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, object type Form) pointing at the standard CustTable form - this is what the tile opens on click; (3) a tile DemoBlockedCustomersTile (d365fo_file objectType "tile") with Label, Size=Wide, MenuItemName=ConDemoBlockedCustomersMI and Query=ConDemoBlockedCustomersQuery. A tile without a Query is a link tile, not a Cue, and FAILS this case. All three objects must build with zero BP errors.
